featureName: FUNCTION 33: RECIPIENT LIST - EDIT TO FAV (FROM ALL, FAVOURITE, CUSTOM TAB)

content.featureName: FUNCTION 33: RECIPIENT LIST - EDIT TO FAV (FROM ALL, FAVOURITE, CUSTOM TAB)
validationRules: No. | Field | Mandatory | Data Type | Format | Data Source | Validation | Integration | Remark
businessRules: 1 | 1. Upon tapping [Save] button, system to check: a. If the beneficiary is either added to or removed from "favourite" list, S2U is required. b. If action does not require S2U and for successful attempt, system displays a toastbar message "List updated." c. If none of the Fav or Custom list is selected, render the [Save] button to [Remove] button, it will trigger Remove function. Refer to Recipient - Add to Fav Business Rules for status screen behaviour. | IAM: 1. S2U Auth status ECLIPSE: Update favourite list(s) with the recipient selected

chunks.content:
Edit Favourite List
Permutation of favourite list selections
No. | Field | Mandatory | Data Type | Format | Data Source | Validation | Integration | Remark

No. | Description | Integration | Remark
1 | 1. Upon tapping [Save] button, system to check: a. If the beneficiary is either added to or removed from "favourite" list, S2U is required. b. If action does not require S2U and for successful attempt, system displays a toastbar message "List updated." c. If none of the Fav or Custom list is selected, render the [Save] button to [Remove] button, it will trigger Remove function. Refer to Recipient - Add to Fav Business Rules for status screen behaviour. | IAM: 1. S2U Auth status ECLIPSE: Update favourite list(s) with the recipient selected
